mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.store_id, s.store_name, i.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_code, i.quantity, i.expiry_date, i.received_at, i.status, i.lot_number, i.location, i.last_count_date, i.remarks, i.create_time, i.update_time FROM retail_inventory i LEFT JOIN retail_store s ON i.store_id = s.id LEFT JOIN retail_product p ON i.product_id = p.id WHERE i.id = #{id} AND i.is_deleted = 0

SELECT i.id, i.store_id, s.store_name, i.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_code, i.quantity, i.expiry_date, i.received_at, i.status, i.lot_number, i.location, i.last_count_date, i.remarks, i.create_time, i.update_time FROM retail_inventory i LEFT JOIN retail_store s ON i.store_id = s.id LEFT JOIN retail_product p ON i.product_id = p.id WHERE i.product_id = #{productId} AND i.is_deleted = 0

SELECT i.id, i.store_id, s.store_name, i.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_code, i.quantity, i.expiry_date, i.received_at, i.status, i.lot_number, i.location, i.last_count_date, i.remarks, i.create_time, i.update_time FROM retail_inventory i LEFT JOIN retail_store s ON i.store_id = s.id LEFT JOIN retail_product p ON i.product_id = p.id WHERE i.store_id = #{storeId} AND i.product_id = #{productId} AND i.is_deleted = 0
